locale_help: The post's language. Hungarian (hu) or English (en). Immutable after publish. Translations are linked via the Translation group id.
title: Title
slug_help: This will be the /blog/<slug> URL on the landing. Don't change after publishing.
slug_taken: This slug is already taken for this project and locale.
excerpt_placeholder: Short summary for listings and meta description.
excerpt_help: Maximum {max} chars. Empty generates from the first body paragraph.
cover_image_empty: No cover image uploaded. Switch to edit mode to upload one.
cover_image_help: Shown on listing cards and as OG image fallback.
cover_upload_hint: Click or drag an image here
cover_upload_formats: WebP, PNG, JPG or AVIF (max 10 MB)
cover_type_rejected: File type not allowed: {type}. WebP, PNG, JPG, AVIF only.
cover_save_first_hint: Save the post as a draft first to upload a cover image.
body_help: The full post content. Rich-text editor (Tiptap): headings, lists, blockquote, code, link, image.
section_main_desc_create: Fill in title, body, and locale. The rest is optional.
section_main_desc_edit: Project, slug, and locale are immutable after publish.
section_seo_desc: These fields determine how the post appears in Google search results and social media shares.
section_translations_desc: The translation group id (UUID). Posts with the same id are translations of each other. Leave empty to start a new group; paste an existing id to link translations.
translations_desc: The translation group id. Copy it when creating a new locale version, or use the button below to start a new translation.
translations_group_id_help: Locked in edit mode — once the post is saved, the group cannot be changed. To start a new group, delete this post and create a new one.
translations_add_new_help: Opens the create form pre-filled with this group id. Pick another language and write the content.
seo_title_help: Maximum {max} chars. Empty falls back to the post title.
seo_description_help: Maximum {max} chars. Shown under the title in Google search results.
og_image_help: Shown when shared on Facebook, Twitter, Slack, LinkedIn. Automatically uses the cover image. Recommended size: 1200x630.
og_image_no_cover: No cover image uploaded. Upload one above to enable the social-share preview.
canonical_url_help: If the content is syndicated on another domain, set the original URL here. Empty means auto.
publish_confirm_body: Publish "{title}"? The post will be visible on the public landing page.
unpublish_confirm_body: Unpublish "{title}"? The post will no longer be visible on the public landing page.
delete_confirm_body: Delete "{title}"? The landing page will also lose it.
public_preview_desc: After publishing, the landing page will serve this post at this URL.
validation_title_too_long: Title can be at most {max} chars
validation_slug_too_long: Slug can be at most {max} chars
validation_slug_format: Slug must be lowercase kebab-case (a-z, 0-9, hyphens)
validation_excerpt_too_long: Excerpt can be at most {max} chars
validation_seo_title_too_long: SEO title can be at most {max} chars
validation_seo_desc_too_long: SEO description can be at most {max} chars
